reviews.review_title: Goofiest, most outdated browser app ever
reviews.review_description: Design sucks.  It is very outdated. I wouldn't trust my private information over this app. It has an environment when we already have Meta Loft. Why bother users with this when we want our other Horizon apps open? This browser should be removed from the Horizon Store.  It should just be browser windows rather than a whole environment where we can't multitask, refer to a webpage and get back to what we were doing without invoking a whole environment. Very silly and antiquated design choice.

Clunky keyboard and it spawned me outside of the room. It closed on me suddenly and the browser screen itself has a large undestructible controls menu. A Nokia has better design.

DO NOT GET IT UNLESS YOU'RE DESPARATE AND UNABLE TO USE THE DEFAULT BROWSER!!!!

I only got it to watch better call saul after my parents locked the default browser.

I paid for the service and didn't get any of their features unlocked. Luckily I have no additional content downloaded so it will be an easy refund. Absolutely gutted as I wanted an app to run my dungeons and dragons game, with all my notes, NPC sheets and PC sheets displayed around me to make the challenging role of dungeon master easier.
What a disappointment
Just wondering if you can download games with this app 🤔

Works fine for me! No problems. Let’s keep
It that way!!!

Disney plus was. Working fine in meta browser but they destroyed with no option desktop mode 
So i had to install this app this works but quality 1080p not showing only 720p Which is disappointing 

1080p full hd works on meta quest 2 but not on this browser 👎🏻

The browser would not even open in quest 3. It stopped working after 3 weeks, unable to get a refund.
Don't bring  a product to market , if you cannot deliver.

developer_response.body:
I’m sorry you had a bad experience with the app.
Our app is compatible with Meta Quest 3. Normally, it should not stop working, but if the app completely ceases to function, please try deleting the application data for Oasis Browser from the 'Storage' section in the Quest settings menu. If the problem persists, please send us a DM to our X account, and we will assist you.
https://twitter.com/oasis_browser

Regarding refunds, our app's refund policy adheres to that of Meta Quest. If you wish to request a refund, please contact Meta's customer support.

reviews.review_description:
I can barely read and type in this dumb app

I’d rather just use the browser on my phone
Nothing seems to be working properly. It's very difficult to aim the cursor at the tiny UI buttons. The app isn't well optimized in terms of performance and design in general.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. We sincerely apologize for the issues you have pointed out. We have just released a new version aimed at improving user operability. This update includes enhancements to Ray operations and UI improvements to reduce tap malfunctions.
If you are willing, we would greatly appreciate it if you could try out the new version and share your feedback with us. Furthermore, we plan to continue regular updates aimed at enhancing usability and performance. Please do not hesitate to provide us with any requests or suggestions you may have. 
Thank you very much for your valuable input.
